name: Zoho CRM
description: Zoho CRM (37 tools): full read/write on Leads (incl. convert_lead), Contacts, Accounts, Deals, Tasks, Cases via REST API v8 — plus Notes CRUD, Users listing, COQL query, and dynamic fields discovery (returns ALL fields incl. custom per Zoho org). Auth via Self-Client OAuth (one-time grant code exchange, then refresh-token-based server-to-server access). Regional endpoints: .com, .eu, .in, .com.au, .jp, .com.cn.

credentials_required.label: Zoho Region Code (just 'com' or 'eu' — not a URL)
credentials_required.hint: Enter ONLY the 2-6 letter suffix from your Zoho login URL. Examples: if you log in at accounts.zoho.COM -> type: com — if accounts.zoho.EU -> type: eu — if accounts.zoho.COM.AU -> type: com.au. DO NOT enter https://, dots at the start, or the full domain. Valid values: com (USA/Global), eu (Europe/GDPR), in (India), com.au (Australia), jp (Japan), com.cn (China). Unsure? Go to zoho.com, log in, then check the URL in your browser — the part after 'zoho.' is your region.

credentials_required.label: Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Zoho API Console -> https://api-console.zoho.{region} -> 'Add Client' -> 'Self Client' -> Create. Copy 'Client ID' from the generated card. Starts with '1000.XXXX...'.

credentials_required.label: Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: Same Self-Client card as Client ID. Click 'Client Secret' -> Copy. Long hex string.

credentials_required.label: Grant Code (one-time)
credentials_required.hint: In the Self-Client console, tab 'Generate Code' -> Scope: 'ZohoCRM.modules.ALL,ZohoCRM.settings.ALL,ZohoCRM.coql.READ,ZohoCRM.users.READ' -> Time Duration 10 minutes -> Create -> Copy the Grant Code (starts with '1000.XXXX...'). Paste it here within 10 minutes — the skill automatically exchanges it for a long-lived refresh token on first use (no terminal / curl needed). The grant code is single-use and deleted after exchange. If it expired or was already used, just generate a new one and re-add via add_credential.

tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: List recent Leads. Returns ALL fields (incl. custom fields) via dynamic discovery. Optional: limit (1-200, default 10)

tools.name: search_leads
tools.description: Search Leads. Two modes: word-search (param: word=searchterm) for full-text across all fields (most reliable); OR criteria-search (params: field, operator=equals|starts_with|contains, value). Example: word=Maclead or field=Email,operator=equals,value=max@edge.com. Returns all fields.

tools.name: get_lead
tools.description: Get single Lead by Zoho ID (18-char numeric). Returns all fields.

tools.name: create_lead
tools.description: Create Lead. Required: Last_Name, Company. Optional: First_Name, Email, Phone, Title, Lead_Source, Lead_Status, Industry, Description, custom_fields (JSON-string for any Zoho field, e.g. '{"VIP_Status":true,"Projektnummer":"P-123"}')

tools.name: update_lead
tools.description: Update Lead by Id. Any of: First_Name, Last_Name, Company, Email, Phone, Title, Lead_Source, Lead_Status, Industry, Description, custom_fields (JSON-string)

tools.name: delete_lead
tools.description: Delete Lead by Id. Soft-Delete — restorable from Recycle Bin for 60 days.

tools.name: convert_lead
tools.description: Convert a Lead into Contact + Account (+ optional Deal) — Zoho's classic Lead-Qualification flow. Required: lead_id. Optional Deal creation: Deal_Name, Stage, Closing_Date (all three required together if any is set), plus Amount, Probability. Optional: assign_to (user ID). Returns the IDs of the newly created Contact/Account/Deal.

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List recent Contacts. Returns all fields. Optional: limit (1-200, default 10)

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search Contacts. word-search (word=X) or criteria (field, operator, value). Common fields: Email, Phone, Last_Name, Account_Name

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get Contact by Id. Returns all fields incl. custom.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create Contact. Required: Last_Name. Optional: First_Name, Email, Phone, Mobile, Title, Account_Name (as ID), Mailing_City, Mailing_Country, Description, custom_fields (JSON-string)

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update Contact by Id. Any of: First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone, Mobile, Title, Account_Name, Mailing_City, Mailing_Country, Description, custom_fields

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Delete Contact by Id (Soft-Delete, 60d recyclable)

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List recent Accounts (companies). Returns all fields. Optional: limit

tools.name: search_accounts
tools.description: Search Accounts. word-search or criteria-search. Common: Account_Name, Industry, Website, Phone

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get Account by Id incl. Industry, Phone, Website, Billing_City/Country, Employees, Annual_Revenue + all custom fields

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create Account. Required: Account_Name. Optional: Phone, Website, Industry, Billing_City, Billing_Country, Employees (number), Annual_Revenue (number), Description, custom_fields

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update Account by Id. Any of: Account_Name, Phone, Website, Industry, Billing_City, Billing_Country, Employees, Annual_Revenue, Description, custom_fields. NOTE: no delete_account — delete Accounts manually in Zoho UI to prevent Cascade data loss.

tools.name: list_deals
tools.description: List recent Deals (Opportunities). Returns all fields. Optional: limit

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search Deals. word or criteria. Common: Stage, Amount, Closing_Date, Deal_Name, Account_Name, Owner

tools.name: get_deal
tools.description: Get Deal by Id incl. Stage, Amount, Probability, Closing_Date, Account_Name + all custom

tools.name: create_deal
tools.description: Create Deal. Required: Deal_Name, Stage (e.g. 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Closed Won'), Closing_Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional: Amount (number), Account_Name (as ID), Contact_Name (as ID), Probability (0-100), Type, Lead_Source, Description, custom_fields

tools.name: update_deal
tools.description: Update Deal by Id. Any of: Deal_Name, Stage, Closing_Date, Amount, Account_Name, Contact_Name, Probability, Type, Lead_Source, Description, custom_fields. NOTE: no delete_deal for revenue-record safety.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List recent Tasks. Returns all fields. Optional: limit

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get single Task by Id. Returns all fields incl. custom.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create Task. Required: Subject. Optional: Description, Status (Not Started|In Progress|Completed|Deferred|Waiting for input), Priority (High|Highest|Low|Lowest|Normal), Due_Date (YYYY-MM-DD), What_Id (Account/Deal ID), Who_Id (Contact/Lead ID), Owner (user ID), custom_fields

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update Task by Id — common use: mark Status=Completed. Any of: Subject, Status, Priority, Due_Date, Description, custom_fields.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete Task by Id (Soft-Delete, 60d Recycle Bin).

tools.name: list_cases
tools.description: List recent Cases (Service module). Returns all fields. Optional: limit

tools.name: get_case
tools.description: Get single Case by Id. Returns all fields incl. custom.

tools.name: create_case
tools.description: Create Case. Required: Subject, Status (New|On Hold|Closed|Escalated). Optional: Description, Priority (High|Low|Normal), Case_Origin (Email|Phone|Web), Type, Account_Name (as ID), Contact_Name (as ID), custom_fields

tools.name: update_case
tools.description: Update Case by Id — common use: Status transitions and resolution notes. Any of: Subject, Status, Priority, Description, Case_Origin, custom_fields.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List Notes attached to any record. Required: parent_module (Leads|Contacts|Accounts|Deals|Tasks|Cases), parent_id (record ID). Optional: limit. Notes are Zoho's record-level activity log / comments.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Attach a Note to any Zoho record — common for logging interactions, call outcomes, status updates. Required: parent_module (Leads|Contacts|Accounts|Deals|Tasks|Cases), parent_id. At least one of Note_Title or Note_Content.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List Zoho CRM users — use to find Owner/assignee user IDs for create_task (Owner param) or convert_lead (assign_to). Optional: type (ActiveUsers|DeactiveUsers|AdminUsers|CurrentUser|...). Default: ActiveUsers.

tools.name: coql_query
tools.description: Run raw COQL query (Zoho's SQL-like). Params: query (full string). MUST include WHERE clause (Zoho v8 enforces this). Example: 'SELECT First_Name, Last_Name, Email FROM Leads WHERE Last_Name is not null LIMIT 10'. Max 200 rows/page. NOTE: use Zoho field API names (Last_Name not lastname).

tools.name: describe_module
tools.description: Get metadata for a Zoho module (field names, types, picklist values). Param: module_name (Leads|Contacts|Accounts|Deals|Tasks|Cases|Products|Quotes|etc). Useful to discover custom field API names before create/update.

author: freddy-schuetz
